name: Wave RuPay Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 1 Reward Point / ₹200 spent (capped at 250 points per month)

specialSpendRules.notes: Reward points on insurance transactions are capped at 250 points per calendar month.
Government services/transactions do not earn reward points.

milestones.label: 1,000 bonus Reward Points on achieving quarterly spend of ₹50,000

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions within first 30 days of card issuance (capped at ₹200)

joiningBenefits: 10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions within first 30 days of card issuance (capped at ₹200)
additionalBenefits: RuPay card enabled for UPI payments — link to any UPI app and pay via QR codes
additionalDetails: The Wave card is a floater RuPay card linked to your primary Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card. It shares the same credit limit but generates a separate billing statement and requires separate payment.
Eligible only for existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card holders. Not available if your primary card is already a RuPay variant.
A redemption convenience fee of ₹99 + GST applies per redemption request.

salaried: Existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card holder
Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines
selfEmployed: Existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card holder
Subject to Federal Bank credit guidelines

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-15.
The Wave card is a floater/add-on RuPay credit card linked to an existing Federal Bank Visa or Mastercard credit card. It shares the credit limit but has a separate billing statement.
Base reward rate: 1 point per ₹200 spent (0.5% earn rate).
Insurance transactions (MCC 6300 & 5960) earn 1x reward point capped at 250 points per calendar month, effective July 15, 2024.
Government transactions are excluded from rewards, effective July 15, 2024.
Redemption convenience fee of ₹99 + GST per redemption request.
Welcome offer: 10% cashback on first 5 UPI transactions within first 30 days, capped at ₹200.
Milestone: 1,000 bonus reward points on quarterly spend of ₹50,000.
Original sourceUrl returned 404 (https://www.federalbank.co.in/wave-credit-card). Updated to main credit cards page.
